name: BIOLIFE SOLUTIONS INC
business: We are a life sciences company that develops, manufactures, and markets bioproduction products and services which are designed to improve quality and de-risk biologic manufacturing, distribution, and transportation in the cell and gene therapy industry.

exposures.sentence: We are a life sciences company that develops, manufactures, and markets bioproduction products and services which are designed to improve quality and de-risk biologic manufacturing, distribution, and transportation in the cell and gene therapy industry.

tamClaims.claim: ARM reported an expected $2.0 billion in revenues over the next five years from recently developed and FDA approved CGT therapies
tamClaims.sentence: Additionally, ARM reported an expected $2.0 billion in revenues over the next five years from recently developed and FDA approved CGT therapies, with continued investment in CGT development from the world's largest biopharma companies throughout 2025.
